title: bidens torta
intro: Bidens torta, also known as the 'Torta Beggar's Lice' or 'Torta Beggar's Tick', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Bidens torta has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Bidens torta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
